title: phyllanthus caroliniensis subsp. stenopterus
intro: Phyllanthus caroliniensis subsp. stenopterus, also known as the Carolina greenweed or greenweed, is a plant species in the Euphorbiaceae family. Traditionally, this plant has been used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating liver and kidney issues due to its hepatoprotective and nephroprotective effects. The health benefits of Phyllanthus caroliniensis subsp. stenopterus include its ability to lower blood pressure, reduce inflammation, and act as an antioxidant, which can help protect against cell damage and oxidative stress. The plant can be prepared in various herbal forms, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and health benefits.
